name: Paramount Gold and Silver Corp.
description: Paramount Gold and Silver Corp. was an exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of precious metal properties. The company held significant assets, including the San Miguel project in northern Mexico and the Sleeper gold project in Nevada, USA. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the firm operated as an exploration-stage entity before being acquired by Coeur Mining, Inc. in 2015, which led to the spin-off of its Nevada assets into a new entity, Paramount Gold Nevada Corp.
